result.synthesis_reasoning: Agreement exists between Topology Agent (structural plausibility of currencyservice as the downstream cause) and the propagation path direction from currencyservice to frontend. Log Agent provides weak support (no errors observed in window), which lowers confidence in a frontend-originated root cause and makes currencyservice a more credible candidate as an unobserved or transient latency source. The TCB-RCA baseline does not highlight currencyservice as a root cause in this window, so its guidance is deprioritized due to lack of timing evidence linking currencyservice to the symptom. Given the absence of explicit logs but a plausible propagation path, currencyservice is favored as the most credible root-cause candidate within the provided evidence, with a moderate overall confidence reflecting the absence of confirmatory log events.
